extensionDescription.message: Paginates long articles using Readability.js, optimizing content for Firefox's AI sidebar.

extractionError.message:
❌ PageNexus: Could not extract the article from this page.

Try with another page (e.g.: Wikipedia articles).

optionsSelectAI.message: Select the AI you use in the sidebar

optionsAutoCopyHint.message: Copies the current page content when navigating between pages

optionsCharLimitsHint.message: Customize the limits for each AI according to your needs

optionsCloseTabAfterCopyHint.message: Closes the current tab after the content is copied to the clipboard

optionsShowContextMenusHint.message: Adds bulk actions to the tab right-click menu (run on all tabs, tabs to the right, etc.)

contextMenuRunTabsRightClose.message: Run on tabs to the right & close

contextMenuRunTabsLeftClose.message: Run on tabs to the left & close
